parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ provider: $json.provider, category: 'credit', amountEur: $json.balanceEur, periodStart: $now.toISO(), periodEnd: $now.toISO(), description: $json.provider + ' account balance ($' + $json.balanceUsd + ')', rawData: { balance_usd: $json.balanceUsd, balance_eur: $json.balanceEur, threshold_usd: $json.thresholdUsd, low_balance: $json.lowBalance, checked_at: $now.toISO() } }) }}
